_README: Alert policy: fires when LLM error rate sustains above the noise floor.
Catches: bad API key, provider outage, malformed model id, rate-limit spiral.
Threshold: >5 errors in any 5-minute window (≈1/min sustained). Bursty
Strip this _README before passing to gcloud.

documentation.content:
More than 5 llm_error events in 5 minutes. Triage:

1. Read recent errors:
   gcloud logging read 'resource.type=cloud_run_revision AND jsonPayload.event="llm_error"' --limit=20 --order=desc --format='value(jsonPayload.model,jsonPayload.error)'

2. If one model dominates, check provider status (status.openai.com / status.anthropic.com / etc.) and consider rotating the BETA_API_KEYS user OR routing that lane to a fallback model in core/routing.py.

3. If errors hit ALL models, check that secrets aren't expired:
   gcloud secrets versions access latest --secret=OPENAI_API_KEY | head -c 8
